title: Goddess UI [Unofficial Java Port]
description: An UI resource pack that adds new features, tweaks and UI designs to make your Minecraft gameplay better!
body:
**Description** Goddess UI Pack is a UI resource pack that adds new features, tweaks and UI designs to make your Minecraft gameplay better! Original creator: @Itzriyo157 ([https://youtube.com/@Itzriyo157](https://www.youtube.com/@Itzriyo157)) Discord Server: https://discord.gg/n35gR2PXMb

(Bedrock Edition) Video Showcase:

I highly recommend watching the video for a better explanation of the features.

Latest (Bedrock Edition) Showcase:



Notices:

- **This pack only supports English for now.** - **For some devices, Night Vision (Brightness Overlay) does not work for unknown reasons, most of the devices that do not work are Window.** ## Features: For now, it has: - Clock and compass - Inventory HUD - Empty Inventory Slot Counter - Recovery Compass - Some tweaks to the title screen. - New "Play" button. # Credits: @Itzriyo157 ([Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@Itzriyo157)) - Inspiration to make this mod. @tlgm2308 ([X/Twitter](https://x.com/tlgm2308)): - Some inspirations content and smithing armor preview idea. @Dimzcraft ([Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dimz404)): - Chunk viewer and durability item text code. @T1M0THY ([Youtube](https://youtube.com/@t1m0thyyt)): - Toggle Night Vision ([Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/toggle-night-vision)) The Andromedarius ([Mcpedl](https://mcpedl.com/user/the-andromedarius/)): - Dynamic Day Counter Idea. drav0011 ([bedrocktweaks.net](https://bedrocktweaks.net/)): - Auto-Complete Chat Buttons. # Compatibility: To enable compatibility, go to resource packs and enable the "Goddess UI Compat" pack. Here are all the mods that have compatibility with this mod: - All of `Entity Features` mods. - Recently: Flashback


**THIS MOD IS AN UNOFFICIAL PORT OF A BEDROCK PACK. PLEASE SUPPORT THE [ORIGINAL PACK CREATOR](https://www.curseforge.com/members/itzriyo157)** # Downsides: This mod would have some downsides in the future. Because the next update would change the config screen entirely, your old config would not load. **MOD MADE WITH PERMISSION FROM THE ORIGINAL AUTHOR** ![Proof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f118e4cd52d9085e44817d9474488c562251b783.png)
